name: nodeflow
description: Risk-adaptive workflow skills for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Risk-adaptive workflow skills for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Nodeflow provides one entry skill and focused workflow nodes for planning, execution, review, verification, release preparation, and handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use Nodeflow to plan and execute this change.
Use Nodeflow to review the current diff.
Use Nodeflow to prepare this release.
